name: nelx-claude
description: Agents and skills for WoW addon development and general use

plugins.name: implement-story
plugins.description: Implements a specific NelxRated story end-to-end: reads spec, writes Lua, updates .toc

plugins.name: lua-linter
plugins.description: Static analysis linter for NelxRated: WoW Midnight 12.x issues, addon bugs, code quality

plugins.name: release-prep
plugins.description: Prepares NelxRated for CurseForge release: TOC fixes, packaging files, go/no-go report

plugins.name: review-addon
plugins.description: Reviews NelxRated implementation completeness against epic docs and updates docs to match

plugins.name: write-story
plugins.description: Writes clear, unambiguous NelxRated stories by interrogating requirements before writing

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Ship a new version: bump semver, commit, tag, push to trigger CurseForge release

plugins.name: update-readme
plugins.description: Sync README.md with current NelxRated features from epic docs and CLAUDE.md

plugins.name: wow-api-research
plugins.description: Research and verify WoW API assumptions with sourced facts before they become story criteria

plugins.name: wow-ui-designer
plugins.description: NelxRated Midnight design system and UI reference for production-ready WoW 12.x frame code
